title: mollia
intro: Mollia is a genus of flowering plants in the family Ochnaceae, commonly known as the chaff tree or chaff flower. The Mollia plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Mollia include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and astringent. Mollia is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
